notes: A default player input-bindings configuration (R-SYS-007 / L-45): named actions plus a gameplay context (WASD move + mouse fire) and a modal pause-menu UI context that CAPTURES all input while it is on the stack, so gameplay does not receive input while the menu is open. The routing front-end (src/packages/input/) applies this layered UI-capture arbitration and feeds the mapped actions to the sim InputState sink. This is the authored ctx:input-bindings few-shot form an AI author should emit.
